description: Plot claiming, dropper/conveyor production, prestige loop, upgrade UI, game pass + shop monetization.

placeholders.{{TAGLINE}}: Short marketing tagline from concept.tagline (loading screen)
placeholders.{{MECHANIC_TAG}}: Genre tag from concept.mechanic_tag (drives DesignSystem palette)
placeholders.{{THEME_DESCRIPTOR}}: One-word theme used in UI copy (e.g. 'Pirate')
placeholders.{{PRESTIGE_NAME}}: Name of the prestige action (e.g. 'Set Sail')
placeholders.{{GAME_PASSES_LUA}}: Lua table literal of game passes from monetization config
placeholders.{{SHOP_ITEMS_LUA}}: Lua table literal of shop items from monetization config
placeholders.{{TOOLBOX_ASSET_IDS_LUA}}: Lua table literal of resolved toolbox asset ids
placeholders.{{CROSS_PROMO_LUA}}: Lua table literal of sibling games on this genre account: {title, universe_id, place_id}
placeholders.{{RETENTION_REWARD_BOOST}}: Numeric multiplier on milestone-streak daily rewards (LiveOps balance knob, default 1)
placeholders.{{BASE_DROP_VALUE}}: Numeric base currency per drop (LiveOps balance knob, default 1)
placeholders.{{DROP_INTERVAL_SECONDS}}: Numeric seconds between drops (LiveOps balance knob, default 2.0)
placeholders.{{STARTING_CURRENCY}}: Numeric starting currency (LiveOps balance knob, default 0)
placeholders.{{MONETIZATION_LUA}}: Lua table literal of the three-tier monetization config (shop items, tiers, product ids)
